scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:backend:coverage && npm run test:frontend:coverage
scripts.test:backend:coverage: c8 --temp-directory coverage/backend/tmp --reports-dir coverage/backend --include 'src/backend/**/*.js' --reporter text --reporter html --reporter json-summary node --test 'test/backend/**/*.js'
scripts.test:e2e:coverage:report: c8 report --temp-directory coverage/e2e/tmp --reports-dir coverage/e2e --include 'src/**/*.js' --reporter text --reporter html --reporter json-summary
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:e2e:coverage: rm -rf coverage/e2e && E2E_COVERAGE=1 playwright test && npm run test:e2e:coverage:report
scripts.validate: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run duplicates && npm run deps:check && npm run test && npm run test:ui-catalog
scripts.fix: npm run format:fix && npm run lint:fix
scripts.deps: dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type dot --include-only '^src/backend' src/backend/index.js | dot -T svg > doc/deps-backend.svg && dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type dot --include-only '^src/frontend' src/frontend/app.js | dot -T svg > doc/deps-frontend.svg
